title: Bajrang Setu: India’s First Glass-Floor Suspension Bridge Set To Boost Tourism In Rishikesh
description: The Bajrang Setu, India's first glass-floor suspension bridge over the Ganga in Rishikesh, is nearly finished, undergoing technical testing. It measures 132 meters long and 8 meters wide, costing ₹60 crore, and features a 5-meter-wide steel deck for bicycles and 1.5-meter-wide glass walkways for pedestrians.
